nasb.text: Therefore say to them, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “None of My words will be delayed any longer. Whatever word I speak will be performed,” ’ ” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: Therefore say to them, Thus says the Lord God: None of my words will be delayed any longer, but the word that I speak will be performed, declares the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 因此，你要對他們說：‘主耶和華這樣說：我所有的話，必沒有一句再耽延；我所說的，都必成就。這是主耶和華的宣告。’”

ccb.text: 因此，你要对他们说，‘主耶和华这样说，我的话必应验，不再迟延。’这是主耶和华说的。”
